title: Saatlı Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Saatlı, with a Z-Score of +3.11. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Saatlı is categorized as CRITICAL, with a CDD of 9.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 38%, while the wind speed is at 22.0 km/h. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, while the CDD is significantly high.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately
